根據《馬卡報》知名記者Jose Felix Diaz消息，皇馬將在最近開始和球隊進行降薪談判，這也是今年以來的第二次降薪，此前在4月初，皇馬宣佈在一線隊，卡斯蒂亞以及高管中降薪10%。

而根據此前Laliga方面的預測，本賽季開始之後，由於長期內無法允許球迷入場，西甲西乙各隊將繼續降薪，這一次西甲各隊平均可能需要降薪25%，而皇馬巴薩這樣的球隊可能更多。

皇馬目前一線隊年薪大約為2.83億歐元，而此前皇馬的計劃是，新賽季一線隊降薪30%，最終加上卡斯蒂亞以及高管們的薪水，可以節省1億歐元的開支。

Txema Corbella, the first team kitman and equipment manager from 1983 to 2014 who was fired by the Rossell board in 2014 has signed the motion of no confidence against the current board.

Corbella was nicknamed 'The President' by the players because of his wonderful relationship with everyone in the dressing room. Valdes remembers him as: "The last person who tried to convince me to stay was Corbella, who is like a father to me and has always protected me. At a dinner, he said, 'You'll never be better off than you are here'. And he's right. We started crying, and went on crying. We're both very sentimental."

He was a loyal member of the club until the Rossell board went on a firing spree and sacked 400 loyal employees in 4 years, Corbella being one of them. And today, he signed the Motion.
